description:
calibre is the one stop solution to all your e-book needs.

calibre is an e-book manager. It can view, convert, edit and catalog e-books in all of the major e-book formats. It can also talk to e-book reader devices. It can go out to the internet and fetch metadata for your books. It can download newspapers and convert them into e-books for convenient reading. It is cross platform, running on Linux, Windows and macOS.
New features
- Annotations browser: Add a color swatch in the results list to make seeing the type of highlight easier
  Closes tickets: 2109496
- Match books in library window: When doing the initial search using the title of the book on the device, if no matches are found remove trailing text in parentheses or after a colon and try again
  Closes tickets: 2117322
- When merging books via drag and drop show the cover of the target book
  Closes tickets: 2118371
- HTMLZ Output: Add support for embedded fonts
  Closes tickets: 2120726
- Plugin installation window: Allow filtering available plugins by category
- Fetch news: Add a sub-menu to the right click menu of the Fetch news button that shows recently downloaded news sources
  Closes tickets: 2119557
Bug fixes
- Edit book: When pasting text from the clipboard ensure it is normalized to NFC form
  Closes tickets: 2099740
- Content server viewer: Improve the selection dialog for choosing a Text-to-speech voice
  Closes tickets: 2109789
- Content server: Fix an error when editing a book's metadata to change both the cover and another field
  Closes tickets: 2117412
New news sources
- Startechery by thekabistro
Improved news sources
- New York Times
- Todoist
- Tagespost
